role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text/script in the image.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific tree species (Betula, Picea) and forest composition.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road surface type and infrastructure (utility poles) as regulatory/infrastructure cues.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole style, image quality) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Russia). The agents provided solid, image-grounded evidence (boreal forest, utility poles). The tournament successfully used this evidence to eliminate distractors (Canada, Sweden) and select the winner over the closest rival (Finland).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of birch/conifer mix and flat terrain match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road and pole descriptions match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Pole configuration analysis is grounded in the image.
